title: STOP Using Claude Code Without This Fable 5 Agentic OS
summary: Chase AI demonstrates how to build a custom Claude Code Agentic OS using Fable 5, covering architecture setup, memory management, and observability to optimize Claude Code efficiency. The video includes a JARVIS walkthrough and guidance on skills customization for agentic workflows.
writeup: Chase AI walks through building a custom Claude Code "Agentic OS" on top of Fable 5, covering architecture setup, memory management, and observability aimed at making Claude Code run more efficiently. The session includes a JARVIS walkthrough and guidance on customizing skills for agentic workflows. The framing connects to multi-agent systems and test-time compute, positioning observability as a way to track and tune how agents operate.
